hypothesis: For mixtures of three to five gases, a GraphSAGE model that uses intermediate-layer embeddings from frozen single-gas predictors and incorporates learned edge weights initialized or regularized by pairwise chemical-reaction overlap will predict radial etching-rate profiles with R2 ≥ 0.90 on unseen composition and operating-condition ranges and will significantly outperform an identical GraphSAGE using a fully connected unweighted graph.
